The Difference

Why Sports Performance?

Athletic success is about more than talent alone. The athletes who reach their full potential are often those who have access to quality coaching, structured training, and consistent guidance throughout their athletic journey. Unfortunately, not every athlete has access to those resources.


Start Training
01 — Sport-Specific
Training That Transfers

Sports performance training goes far beyond simply getting stronger. It focuses on developing the physical qualities that directly transfer to success in competition — strength, power, speed, agility, mobility, movement quality, recovery, and injury resilience.

02 — Individualized
Built Around You

Every athlete has unique demands based on their sport, position, age, experience level, and competitive season, and their training should reflect those needs. Rather than asking "How much can you lift?" — we ask "How can we help you perform better in your sport?"

03 — Accessible
No Matter Where You Are

We believe every athlete deserves access to high-quality performance coaching regardless of where they live, what resources their school has available, or their level of competition.

04 — Long-Term
Our Mission

Our mission is to help athletes become the strongest, fastest, healthiest, and most prepared version of themselves — both on and off the field.

CSCS Certified Specialist
About Spencer

Competed at
Every Level.

My name is Spencer Shipman, founder of Playmaka Sports Performance. I hold a Bachelor Degree in Kinesiology and am a Certified Strength and Conditioning Specialist (CSCS).

As an athlete, I have competed at the junior college, NCAA Division III, and NCAA Division I levels, giving me firsthand experience with the physical and mental demands required to succeed at each stage of athletic development. My coaching background includes strength and conditioning experience with youth, high school, and collegiate athletes.

I founded Playmaka Sports Performance to help athletes and athletic programs gain access to high-quality strength and conditioning support that is often unavailable due to staffing limitations, budget constraints, or lack of resources. My goal is simple: provide athletes with structured, sport-specific training that helps them perform at their highest level while building habits that support long-term athletic success.

  • Certified Strength and Conditioning Specialist (CSCS)
  • Bachelor of Arts in Kinesiology
  • Former JUCO, NCAA Division III, and NCAA Division I Baseball Athlete
Our Approach

Three Principles.
One Standard.

01
Structure

Athletes perform best when training follows a long-term plan aligned with their sport, goals, and competitive calendar.

02
Consistency

Results are earned through repeated effort over time. Sustainable athletic development requires accountability and consistent execution.

03
Communication

Strong relationships between athletes, coaches, parents, and performance staff create better outcomes and stronger athletic cultures.
